chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI JCM NO. 48 of 1993 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge 12.03.2026 None present for the Petitioner. Mr. Pervaiz A. Memon Advocate for the Respondent.......... None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor has any intimation been received. This matter has been pending for over 30 years without any significant progress. Even today none is appearing to pursue the matter. Accordingly, the instant JCM is dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E Ayaz
